description: A designed Mother's Day graphic. The upper portion is a color photograph of two smiling women walking indoors and each holding a bouquet of white roses and a paper gift bag; one wears a dark red turtleknit dress and waves, the other wears a tan jacket. Children's heads are visible in the blurred foreground and a backdrop with circular school logos is behind them. The lower portion reads 'HAPPY MOTHER'S DAY' over a small White House wordmark labeled 'THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON'.
notable_text: HAPPY MOTHER'S DAY; THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON
